The '''Technology Center''' was a building on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], in its capital city, [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]].

During the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|battle at Corellia]], [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] was in the building when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack commenced, and they surrounded the building with [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and performed bombing runs on it. The Tech Center was saved by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] {{1st}}
